name: Arrow Pawn & Jewelry
description_short: Phoenix-based pawn shop offering collateral loans, jewelry services, and buy/sell/trade on electronics, tools, vehicles, and valuables.
description_long:
Arrow Pawn & Jewelry operates a full-service pawn shop located at 2706 W Thomas Rd in Phoenix, Arizona. The business has established itself as a neighborhood pawn operation with extended hours, including a late-night window service available 6pm-9pm Monday through Friday. The shop targets customers needing fast cash through collateral-based loans, as well as buyers and sellers in the secondhand market.

The company offers pawn loans against a wide range of collateral including jewelry, electronics, tools, musical instruments, vehicles (cars, trucks, motorcycles), antiques, and household items. Beyond lending, they actively buy, sell, and trade merchandise, and provide ancillary jewelry services including repair, cleaning, and watch battery replacement. They also offer layaway purchases with a 20% down payment and no fees, providing an alternative to traditional lending. Their website emphasizes competitive rates and claims to "charge lower rates than competitors" and "pay more for valuables."

Arrow Pawn distinguishes itself through accessibility and service speed. Operating Monday-Friday 10am-9pm and Saturday 10am-5pm (closed Sundays), they market themselves as "Phoenix's friendliest pawn shop" with emphasis on "fast friendly service" and "no hassle loans." The late-night window service is a specific operational feature. Their inventory messaging highlights breadth across categories—from luxury vehicles to warehouse liquidation items—suggesting high inventory turnover and diverse sourcing.

As a pawn shop, Arrow Pawn operates within a heavily regulated lending category. While they market lower rates and better valuations, actual terms (APR, loan-to-value ratios, redemption periods) are not disclosed on the website. Customers should verify specific loan terms, interest rates, and redemption policies in person. Like all pawn operations, this model is best suited for customers with valuable collateral seeking immediate cash rather than traditional unsecured lending.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Late-night service window 6pm-9pm Monday-Friday for working customers unable to visit during standard hours
Layaway option with only 20% down and no fees, providing alternative to high-interest lending
Wide range of accepted collateral: jewelry, electronics, tools, vehicles, musical instruments, antiques, and household items
On-site jewelry services including repair, cleaning, and watch battery replacement
Extended daily hours Monday-Friday 10am-9pm allows accessibility before/after work
Buy/sell/trade operations create liquidity and allow customers to access merchandise beyond pawn redemptions
Markets competitive rates and claims to pay more for valuables than competitors
cons: Website does not disclose specific APR rates, loan-to-value ratios, or redemption timeline terms—customers must visit in person
Closed Sundays, limiting access for some customers despite weekday/Saturday availability
Pawn model requires surrendering physical collateral with risk of forfeiture if loan cannot be repaid
No online application, quote, or loan calculator available—all transactions require in-person visits
Claims of 'lower rates' and 'pay more' are unverified and not substantiated with comparative data on website
best_for: Customers with valuable jewelry, electronics, or tools who need fast cash and can repay within typical pawn windows
Vehicle owners seeking collateral-based loans against cars, trucks, or motorcycles without credit checks
Budget-conscious buyers seeking discounted secondhand items across jewelry, electronics, and tools categories
Working customers who need extended hours access and benefit from the 6pm-9pm late window
diagnosis: Arrow Pawn & Jewelry is best for Phoenix-area customers with valuable collateral (jewelry, electronics, vehicles, tools) who need immediate cash and can tolerate the pawn lending model. The primary caveat is that specific loan terms, APR rates, and redemption policies are not disclosed online—customers must visit in person to understand actual borrowing costs and conditions before pledging collateral.
services: Pawn loans on jewelry and diamonds
Pawn loans on electronics and game consoles
Pawn loans on tools and landscaping equipment
Pawn loans on vehicles (cars, trucks, motorcycles)
Pawn loans on musical instruments (guitars, drum kits)
Buy/sell/trade on jewelry, gold, silver, diamonds
Buy/sell/trade on vehicles (luxury vehicles, vans, trucks, cycles)
Layaway purchases with 20% down and no fees
Sale of liquidation and warehouse items
Sale of antiques, camping equipment, bikes, and household items
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
